note: v303: Statements reconcile — the ⋯ line-action menu is grouped instead of one flat list of 8+ options. A deposit now shows 'Record this deposit as' (payment / income / owner contribution), 'From a previous year' (prior-year payment / refund), and 'Fix the line' (split / rejoin / fix amount); a charge shows 'Record this charge as' (expense / owner draw / gift-card return) and 'Fix the line'. The likeliest action leads each group and the mechanical split/fix tools are set apart, so choosing what a bank line is takes less hunting.
